extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won from breakaway after DUMOULIN Tom needed bike change at 18km to go, while YATES Simon's teammate CHAVEZ Esteban lost 10+ minutes.
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott abandoned Chavez chase mid-stage to save team for future stages despite wearing pink jersey.
Quick-Step Floors initially chased for Viviani then abandoned, revealing sprinter protection threshold on rolling terrain.
Androni Giocattoli placed rider in break every road stage, showing systematic breakaway commitment for exposure.

rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: negative: lost 10+ minutes when Sky hammered on rolling plateau, Mitchelton deliberately abandoned him to save domestiques
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: bike mechanical at 18km isolated him from teammates on critical rolling finale
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: personally contested intermediate sprint in pink jersey to extend GC gap to 41 seconds over Dumoulin
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: positioned in breakaway group on hilly stage, showing unexpected climbing form beyond pure sprinter profile
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: shared workload equally with Mohoric in final 5.5km then out-kicked him despite earlier failed attacks
